faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Mineola homes?
faqs.answer: Mineola properties commonly host house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and jumping spiders. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatments accordingly to eliminate infestations effectively.
